steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create worktree and branch task/t0009_calibrate_dendritic_diameters, plan full step list.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0005_download_dsgc_morphology is completed and its SWC asset is available.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create the mandatory task folder scaffold (research/, plan/, assets/, code/, corrections/, intervention/, results/, logs/).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Survey corpus papers (from t0002) for DSGC dendritic diameter measurements, Strahler-order taper, and calibration methodology.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Find external sources (ModelDB, Poleg-Polsky & Diamond 2016, Vaney/Sivyer/Taylor 2012) with diameter-vs-distance or diameter-vs-Strahler data we can use to set target tapers.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0005 SWC ingestion, prior morphology utilities in code/, and any existing diameter-edit helpers in the library/ registry.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the calibration pipeline: SWC parser, Strahler/path-distance computation, taper mapping, floor clamp, output SWC, sanity checks, answer-asset deliverables.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: calibration runs locally on a single CPU; no remote GPU required.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Implement the calibration pipeline, produce assets/dataset/dsgc-baseline-morphology-calibrated/, and compute before/after morphometrics.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Explore alternative taper models (polynomial fits, branch-order vs path-distance), edge cases (ghost children, zero-length segments), and failure modes of the chosen mapping.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: this task produces a calibrated SWC dataset, not a benchmarked metric comparable to published results.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Summarize before/after diameter statistics, surface-area and axial-resistance deltas, and publish metrics.json + results_*.md.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Record follow-up suggestions (e.g., active channel calibration, soma/dendritic impedance check, alternative morphology calibration).

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Finalize session_log.md, run verify_task_completed, open PR, handle pre-merge verification, merge, and refresh overview.
